% Percentage Calculator

Calculate any percentage instantly — three types of percentage problems solved in one place.

1. What is X% of Y?

Enter the values

2. X is what % of Y?

Enter the values

3. Percentage change from X to Y

Enter the values

What is a percentage?

A percentage is a number expressed as a fraction of 100. The symbol % means "per hundred". Percentages are used everywhere — from shop discounts and tax rates to statistics, grades and financial returns.

Frequently asked questions

How do I calculate 20% of 150?

Multiply 150 by 20 and divide by 100. Result: 30. Or multiply by 0.20 directly.

How do I calculate a percentage increase?

Use section 3 above. Subtract original from new value, divide by original, multiply by 100. From 80 to 100 is (100−80)÷80×100 = 25% increase.

How do I work out what percentage one number is of another?

Use section 2 above. Divide the part by the total and multiply by 100. For example, 30 is what % of 200? 30÷200×100 = 15%.
